nodes.standard_name: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
nodes.original_text_name: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
nodes.context: Colombian narcoparamilitary organization and one of the emerging criminal gangs serving drug trafficking (Bacrim), part of the Colombian internal armed conflict.
Colombian paramilitary group; its Bloque Centauros was predecessor to ERPAC.
Colombian guerrilla group; ERPAC disputed territory and made territorial agreements with them.
Criminal group defeated by ERPAC in 2008.
Colombian criminal group that bought the Bloque Meta franchise from ERPAC in 2013.
Colombian criminal group; allied with ERPAC and later sought to control its territory.
Successor group to ERPAC after reunification of its two blocs under alias Puntilla.
Colombian guerrilla group; its dissident faction commanded by alias Megateo had business relationship with Puntilla.
Colombian criminal organization listed as ally of ERPAC in infobox.
Colombian guerrilla group listed as enemy of ERPAC in infobox.
Possible remnant of ERPAC after its dismantling, run by the Pachón Rozo family.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: Era el heredero de los espacios militares y de narcotráfico del Bloque Centauros de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia
edges.context: ERPAC inherited military and drug trafficking spaces from AUC's Bloque Centauros.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: Llegó a disputar el territorio con las FARC-EP por el control de los cultivos de coca de su zona de influencia
edges.context: ERPAC disputed territory with FARC-EP over coca crops.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: realizó un acuerdo territorial con las FARC-EP
edges.context: ERPAC made a territorial agreement with FARC-EP.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: El ERPAC estuvo en guerra con 'Los Macacos' a quienes derrotó en 2008
edges.context: ERPAC was at war with Los Macacos and defeated them in 2008.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos habrían comprado en 2013 la franquicia del Bloque Meta
edges.context: Los Rastrojos bought the Bloque Meta franchise from ERPAC in 2013.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Clan del Golfo o Autodefensas Gaitanistas de Colombia (AGC)
edges.context: Clan del Golfo is listed as an ally of ERPAC in the infobox.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.context: Oficina de Envigado is listed as an ally of ERPAC in the infobox.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.context: ELN is listed as an enemy of ERPAC in the infobox.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: reunificando los dos grupos; esta vez con un nuevo nombre: "Los Puntilleros"
edges.context: ERPAC's two blocs were reunified under the name Los Puntilleros.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: con el cual mantenía una relación de negocios
edges.context: Puntilla (leader of ERPAC's successor) had a business relationship with the EPL dissident group.

edges.target: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: Otoniel ya estaba trabajando de la mano con el otro grupo criminal de los Llanos: el Bloque Libertadores del Vichada
edges.context: Clan del Golfo worked with the Bloque Libertadores del Vichada (a faction of ERPAC).

edges.target: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: rompió la alianza declarando la guerra
edges.context: Pijarvey (leader of Bloque Libertadores del Vichada) broke the alliance with Clan del Golfo and declared war.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
edges.evidence_quote: Se presume que lo poco que quedó de la organización está en manos de la familia Pachón Rozo ... haciendosen conocer como Los Monroy
edges.context: Remnants of ERPAC are possibly run by the Pachón Rozo family under the name Los Monroy.
